original_snippet_context: Discussion of exchange rates and banking transactions.
relevant_quote: Ainda hontem tivemos o mercado fraco, quieto, sendo reproduzidas as tabellas de 15 5/16 e 15 3/8 d., a que se conservaram respectivamente o London e outros bancos.
justification: This snippet describes the state of the exchange market and mentions specific rates, including those offered by London and other banks, without expressing any opinion on the Caixa de Conversão or related policies.
